summary: Phase 6 God Mode & Full Market Scanner testing completed - All backend endpoints working correctly with async polling pattern, frontend responsive design verified across mobile/tablet/desktop, 'Made with Emergent' badge confirmed removed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/batch/god-scan returns job_id immediately with status 'started'
Backend: GET /api/batch/god-scan/{job_id} polls until 'complete' with results containing model_votes, agreement_level, ai_score
Backend: POST /api/signals/generate with god_mode=true returns job_id with async=true
Backend: GET /api/signals/generate-status/{job_id} polls until complete with god_mode_consensus containing agreement_level and model_signals
Backend: POST /api/signals/generate with god_mode=false returns signal directly (synchronous, no job_id)
Backend: GET /api/market/cockpit returns all dashboard sections (indices, vix, breadth, flows, sectors, clusters_52w, pcr, block_deals, corporate_actions)
Backend: Invalid job IDs return 404 with 'Job not found' detail
Frontend: Market Overview page loads with Market Intelligence Cockpit dashboard
Frontend: Batch Scanner page shows 'Ready to Scan' state (no auto-scan)
Frontend: 'Launch God Scan' button present and functional
Frontend: Symbol Analysis page loads with God Mode toggle button
Frontend: 'Made with Emergent' badge is NOT present anywhere in the app
Frontend: Mobile (390px) - Hamburger menu visible and functional
Frontend: Mobile (390px) - Sidebar opens/closes on hamburger click
Frontend: Tablet (768px) - Sidebar collapsed to 64px (icons only)
Frontend: All pages have proper mobile padding (p-4 sm:p-6)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 God Mode features fully tested. Key timing notes: God scan takes 60-120s (poll every 2-3s), God mode signal takes 60-120s (poll every 2-3s), Non-god-mode signal is synchronous (20-30s), Market cockpit takes 15-20s. All endpoints use real APIs (no mocking).

phase_6_assessment.god_scan_batch: ✅ WORKING - POST returns job_id immediately, GET polls until complete with model_votes, agreement_level, ai_score
phase_6_assessment.god_mode_signal: ✅ WORKING - POST returns job_id with async=true, GET polls until complete with god_mode_consensus
phase_6_assessment.synchronous_signal: ✅ WORKING - POST with god_mode=false returns signal directly (no job_id)
phase_6_assessment.mobile_responsiveness: ✅ WORKING - Hamburger menu on 390px, sidebar opens/closes
phase_6_assessment.emergent_badge_removed: ✅ CONFIRMED - 'Made with Emergent' badge NOT present
phase_6_assessment.god_mode_toggle: ✅ WORKING - God Mode button visible on Symbol Analysis page
